vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is effectively dead. The lack of chlorophyll-bearing tissue across all pots indicates a total failure of the botanical system.
vision_report.narrative_description: My audit confirms a total systemic collapse of the botanical collection. The earliest image shows a single, struggling sprout, which subsequently withered. By the current timestamp, all pots are devoid of living plant matter. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at soil amendment, but it has failed to sustain the specimens. The environment is currently a sterile, non-functional biome.
